title: Device Sync
subtitle: Connect Strava or Suunto to import your workouts

autoMatch.title: How Auto-Match Works
autoMatch.desc1: When an activity is imported, we look for a planned workout on the same date with the same sport type and duration within ±40%.
autoMatch.desc2: If matched: the planned workout shows as completed ✓ on your calendar with your actual stats.
autoMatch.desc3: If no match: the activity is still saved and visible here — useful for unplanned extra sessions.

strava.desc: Import all activities — including those auto-synced from your Suunto watch.
strava.note: Free. Suunto → Strava auto-sync means this covers your watch data immediately.

suunto.desc: Direct API access — richer data: R-R intervals, Peak Training Effect, recovery time.
suunto.note: Adds HRV, Peak TE, recovery hours — not available via Strava. Application may take 1-5 days.
